creator: ben@scientia.demon.co.uk
text:
These programs can be used to dump a syscons font file to human readable
form for editing, and then converted back to a raw syscons font file.

It's rather rough around the edges, but it's been recommended to a few
people on -questions so I thought I'd make a port of it.  I might get
around to cleaning it up a bit at some point too.
